category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Botswana (BOBS) mandatory conformity, energy labelling, and import requirements.

title.en: China-to-Botswana Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Botswana market-access requirements: BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) mandatory conformity and BOS import inspection mark, BOS/IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, energy labelling / MEPS, R-600a refrigerant handling, and the in-country importer requirement.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与博茨瓦纳市场准入要求差距对照：BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）强制符合性及BOS进口检验标志、BOS/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、能效标识/MEPS、R-600a制冷剂处理及本地进口商要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與波札那市場准入要求差距對照：BOBS（波札那標準局）強制符合性及BOS進口檢驗標誌、BOS/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、能效標識/MEPS、R-600a製冷劑處理及本地進口商要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Botswana legislation, BOBS compulsory standards, BOS import-inspection scheme requirements, energy labelling rules, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals and the relevant Botswana authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及博茨瓦纳相关主管机构核验现行博茨瓦纳法律、BOBS强制标准、BOS进口检验制度要求、能效标识规则及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及波札那相關主管機構核驗現行波札那法律、BOBS強制標準、BOS進口檢驗制度要求、能效標識規則及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Botswana market-access gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to BOS/IEC 60335-2-24 demonstrated under the BOBS compulsory standards and BOS import-inspection / mark scheme — Chinese CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted, though both derive from IEC 60335-2-24 which can shorten testing; (2) demonstrating EMC performance to the IEC/CISPR 14 basis that BOBS standards adopt; (3) an in-country importer (and BOBS import permit / inspection clearance) is required — Botswana is landlocked, so goods route via Durban or Walvis Bay; (4) energy labelling / MEPS obligations where Botswana operates an energy-efficiency programme, with values that differ from China's GB 12021.2 grades; (5) R-600a (isobutane) is well-positioned because BOS adopts IEC 60335-2-24 charge/flammability limits. Botswana does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime; those EU-specific gaps do not apply. Voltage is 230 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China, nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V).
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临若干博茨瓦纳市场准入差距：（1）须在BOBS强制标准及BOS进口检验/标志制度下证明符合BOS/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全要求——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动接受，但两者均源自IEC 60335-2-24，可缩短检测；（2）须证明符合BOBS标准所采用的IEC/CISPR 14电磁兼容基准；（3）须有本地进口商（及BOBS进口许可/检验放行）——博茨瓦纳为内陆国，货物经德班或鲸湾港转运；（4）若博茨瓦纳实施能效计划，则有能效标识/MEPS义务，其限值与中国GB 12021.2等级不同；（5）R-600a（异丁烷）条件较好，因BOS采用IEC 60335-2-24充注量/可燃性限值。博茨瓦纳不实施欧盟式横向RoHS/电池/户外噪声制度；该等欧盟特有差距不适用。电压为230 V/50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz，标称电压不同于中国220 V）。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨若干波札那市場准入差距：（1）須在BOBS強制標準及BOS進口檢驗/標誌制度下證明符合BOS/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全要求——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動接受，但兩者均源自IEC 60335-2-24，可縮短檢測；（2）須證明符合BOBS標準所採用的IEC/CISPR 14電磁相容基準；（3）須有本地進口商（及BOBS進口許可/檢驗放行）——波札那為內陸國，貨物經德班或鯨灣港轉運；（4）若波札那實施能效計畫，則有能效標識/MEPS義務，其限值與中國GB 12021.2等級不同；（5）R-600a（異丁烷）條件較好，因BOS採用IEC 60335-2-24充注量/可燃性限值。波札那不實施歐盟式橫向RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲制度；該等歐盟特有差距不適用。電壓為230 V/50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz，標稱電壓不同於中國220 V）。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body (BOBS / IEC), or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
